Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Once you have selected the JDS Hiei, you will notice that our formation is already at Ahead 2/3 speed of around 12-15 knots.

One of the most important aspects of ASW detection of submerged contacts is own ship speed. Let's order the formation to slow to Ahead 1/3 speed to reduce self noise, and allow better detection of submerged contacts.
